title: Packaging Meta-Data Unit
description: Schema that describes a Checkbox Packaging Meta-Data unit

os-id.description: Identifier of the operating system this rule applies to, matching the ID field in /etc/os-release.

os-version-id.description: Specific version of the operating system this rule applies to, supports comparison operators.

Depends.description: Comma-separated list of package dependencies for the binary package.

Suggests.description: Comma-separated list of suggested packages for the binary package.

Recommends.description: Comma-separated list of recommended packages for the binary package.
